details.impact: Complex content may alienate general audiences and reduce engagement

results.message: Keyword stuffing detected: 3 words with excessive density

details.impact: Search engines penalize keyword stuffing. This can result in ranking demotions or manual actions.
details.recommendation: Rewrite content to sound natural. Use synonyms and related terms instead of repeating the same keywords. Aim for < 2% density for any single keyword.

details.impact: Excessive linking can appear spammy and dilute page authority
